title: piper ovatum var. hirtellum
intro: Piper ovatum var. hirtellum, also known as the rough-fruited pepper plant, is a variety of Piper ovatum, a type of flowering plant in the pepper family (Piperaceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to provide relief from pain and swelling. The health benefits of Piper ovatum var. hirtellum include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or extracting the essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
